group_brands.name: Tefal / T-fal
group_brands.presence_note_fr: Marque phare, comptes par pays fragmentes ; contenu recette/produit correct mais peu de collabs créateurs marquantes.
group_brands.presence_note_en: Flagship brand, fragmented per-country accounts; decent recipe/product content but few standout creator collabs.

group_brands.name: Moulinex
group_brands.presence_note_fr: Forte en France/Europe Sud ; ton recette familiale, présence solide mais marketing d'influence limite.
group_brands.presence_note_en: Strong in France/Southern Europe; family-recipe tone, solid presence but limited influencer marketing.

group_brands.name: Krups
group_brands.presence_note_fr: Café/espresso au centre ; contenu produit propre, audience plus petite, peu d'UGC.
group_brands.presence_note_en: Coffee/espresso-centric; clean product content, smaller audience, little UGC.

group_brands.name: Rowenta
group_brands.presence_note_fr: Soin/repassage/air ; démos fonctionnelles, ton institutionnel, faible activation créateurs.
group_brands.presence_note_en: Care/ironing/air; functional demos, institutional tone, weak creator activation.

group_brands.name: SEB
group_brands.presence_note_fr: Très centree France (Cookeo/cocotte) ; communauté fidèle recettes mais portée surtout nationale.
group_brands.presence_note_en: Very France-centric (Cookeo/pressure cooker); loyal recipe community but mostly national reach.

group_brands.name: Calor
group_brands.presence_note_fr: Équivalent Rowenta en France ; présence modeste, contenu utilitaire repassage/soin.
group_brands.presence_note_en: Rowenta's France equivalent; modest presence, utilitarian ironing/care content.

group_brands.name: All-Clad
group_brands.presence_note_fr: Premium US, cible chefs/passionnes ; esthétique soignée, collabs culinaires ponctuelles, niche aspirationnelle.
group_brands.presence_note_en: US premium, targets chefs/enthusiasts; polished aesthetic, occasional culinary collabs, aspirational niche.

group_brands.name: WMF
group_brands.presence_note_fr: Premium Allemagne/DACH ; couverts/casseroles/café pro, ton haut de gamme, peu d'influence sociale.
group_brands.presence_note_en: Premium Germany/DACH; cutlery/cookware/pro coffee, upmarket tone, little social influence.

group_brands.name: Lagostina
group_brands.presence_note_fr: Premium Italie, héritage inox ; contenu recettes ital., audience locale, activation créateurs faible.
group_brands.presence_note_en: Italian premium, steel heritage; Italian recipe content, local audience, weak creator activation.

group_brands.name: Emsa
group_brands.presence_note_fr: Conservation/contenants, DACH ; très faible présence sociale et créateurs, marque utilitaire.
group_brands.presence_note_en: Storage/containers, DACH; very low social and creator presence, utilitarian brand.

group_brands.name: Supor
group_brands.presence_note_fr: Leader Chine ; très actif en livestream commerce et KOL Douyin/RED, modèle social-commerce le plus avance du groupe.
group_brands.presence_note_en: China leader; very active in livestream commerce and Douyin/RED KOLs, group's most advanced social-commerce model.

competitors.name: Philips (Versuni)
competitors.note_fr: Airfryer porte par UGC massif ; collabs recettes et ambassadeurs, présence digitale plus structuree que SEB.
competitors.note_en: Airfryer driven by massive UGC; recipe collabs and ambassadors, more structured digital presence than SEB.

competitors.name: Ninja (SharkNinja)
competitors.note_fr: Modèle social-first : 40% du budget en social, seeding créateurs pre-lancement, célébrités (Courteney Cox), viralité TikTok.
competitors.note_en: Social-first model: 40% of budget in social, pre-launch creator seeding, celebrities (Courteney Cox), TikTok virality.

competitors.name: Instant Brands (Instant Pot)
competitors.note_fr: Croissance batie sur communautés Facebook et recettes UGC ; armee d'ambassadeurs et groupes fans très engagés.
competitors.note_en: Growth built on Facebook communities and UGC recipes; ambassador army and highly engaged fan groups.

competitors.name: Breville / Sage
competitors.note_fr: Premium café/cuisine ; collabs avec baristas et chefs, contenu aspirationnel et tutoriels experts.
competitors.note_en: Premium coffee/cooking; collabs with baristas and chefs, aspirational content and expert tutorials.

competitors.name: KitchenAid (Whirlpool)
competitors.note_fr: Icone design (robot patissier) très instagrammable ; collabs couleurs/chefs, fort capital UGC organique.
competitors.note_en: Design icon (stand mixer) highly Instagrammable; color/chef collabs, strong organic UGC equity.

competitors.name: Dyson
competitors.note_fr: Beauté/soin capillaire via influenceurs et hairstylists ; lancements événementiels, très forte machine d'influence.
competitors.note_en: Beauty/hair-care via influencers and hairstylists; event launches, very strong influence machine.

competitors.name: Xiaomi
competitors.note_fr: Écosystème smart-home, communauté fans (Mi Fans) ; co-création, tech-influenceurs, social-commerce China fort.
competitors.note_en: Smart-home ecosystem, fan community (Mi Fans); co-creation, tech influencers, strong China social-commerce.

competitors.name: Bosch / BSH
competitors.note_fr: Image ingenierie/fiabilité ; présence institutionnelle, peu de créateurs, surtout publicité et SAV.
competitors.note_en: Engineering/reliability image; institutional presence, few creators, mainly ads and support.

competitors.name: De'Longhi
competitors.note_fr: Café premium ; ambassadeurs (ex. Brad Pitt), collabs baristas et latte-art, contenu lifestyle café.
competitors.note_en: Premium coffee; ambassadors (e.g. Brad Pitt), barista and latte-art collabs, coffee lifestyle content.

competitors.name: Smeg
competitors.note_fr: Design retro ultra-instagrammable ; collabs mode/lifestyle (Dolce&Gabbana), très fort en UGC esthétique.
competitors.note_en: Retro design ultra-Instagrammable; fashion/lifestyle collabs (Dolce&Gabbana), very strong aesthetic UGC.

competitors.name: Vitamix
competitors.note_fr: Blenders premium santé/wellness ; collabs nutritionnistes et chefs, communauté recettes engagée.
competitors.note_en: Premium health/wellness blenders; nutritionist and chef collabs, engaged recipe community.

competitors.name: Nespresso
competitors.note_fr: Branding célébrité (Clooney) et lifestyle premium ; collabs durabilité, contenu café très soigné.
competitors.note_en: Celebrity branding (Clooney) and premium lifestyle; sustainability collabs, very polished coffee content.

competitors.name: Cosori
competitors.note_fr: DTC airfryer ne du social ; seeding créateurs et UGC recettes massif, croissance via TikTok/Instagram.
competitors.note_en: DTC airfryer born from social; creator seeding and massive recipe UGC, growth via TikTok/Instagram.

competitors.name: Joyoung (China)
competitors.note_fr: Concurrent Supor ; KOL top-tier (Li Jiaqi/Viya), livestream Singles Day a ~100M$, très actif Douyin/Kuaishou.
competitors.note_en: Supor rival; top-tier KOLs (Li Jiaqi/Viya), ~$100M Singles Day livestream, very active on Douyin/Kuaishou.

competitors.name: Midea (China)
competitors.note_fr: Géant électroménager ; gros budgets KOL et livestream commerce, écosystème social-commerce China mature.
competitors.note_en: Appliance giant; large KOL budgets and livestream commerce, mature China social-commerce ecosystem.

gaps_fr: Comptes fragmentes par pays/marque : pas de stratégie créateurs globale unifiee, dispersion de la portée.
Sous-investissement en marketing d'influence vs SharkNinja, Dyson ou Smeg (peu de seeding pre-lancement et d'ambassadeurs).
Contenu trop institutionnel/démo produit, peu d'UGC viral et de formats short-vidéo natifs (TikTok/Reels).
Faible exploitation du social-commerce hors Chine (TikTok Shop, Instagram Shopping) malgré l'avance de Supor en Chine.
Peu de collabs licences/design ou célébrités generant de la désirabilité (écart vs Smeg, Dyson, Nespresso).
Communautés de fans recettes sous-activees vs Instant Pot, alors que SEB/Tefal disposent d'un fort capital culinaire.
gaps_en: Fragmented per-country/per-brand accounts: no unified global creator strategy, reach scattered.
Under-investment in influencer marketing vs SharkNinja, Dyson or Smeg (little pre-launch seeding and ambassadors).
Content too institutional/product-demo, little viral UGC and native short-video formats (TikTok/Reels).
Weak social-commerce outside China (TikTok Shop, Instagram Shopping) despite Supor's China lead.
Few licensing/design or celebrity collabs driving desirability (gap vs Smeg, Dyson, Nespresso).
Recipe fan communities under-activated vs Instant Pot, despite SEB/Tefal's strong culinary equity.
